items.briefing:
A critical security flaw in Cisco SD-WAN software is actively being exploited by attackers, meaning organisations using this networking equipment should apply any available patches immediately. Separately, a cyber breach involving Canva — the popular Australian-founded design platform — is raising concerns for Australian schools, which often use the tool with students. Schools should review their Canva account settings and ensure student data exposure is minimised.

**Practical tip:** If your organisation uses Canva, check that staff and student accounts are set to the appropriate privacy settings and that no unnecessary personal information is stored on the platform.
